title: peraceae
intro: The Peraceae rank refers to the family of flowering plants, specifically a small family of succulent plants that are native to tropical Africa. Peraceae is a family of plants characterized by their unique growth habits and adaptations to arid environments. Members of the Peraceae family are often herbaceous or shrub-like, with leaves that are typically fleshy and succulent. Peraceae plants are relatively rare and are often found in areas with high levels of rainfall and humidity.
